metadata.description: AI-assisted development workflow skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: coding-team
plugins.description: Autonomous coding worker orchestration — issue/PR handoff, load-balanced assignment, and adaptive worker loop for multi-agent development.

plugins.name: skill-manager
plugins.description: Manage Claude Code skills — migrate skills from a project into a team-skills marketplace plugin.

plugins.name: observability
plugins.description: Query logs from Axiom for debugging and observability.

plugins.name: ui-deep-dive
plugins.description: Generate UI design variants for GitHub issues — snapshot baseline, create variants, publish to GitHub Pages.
